mapper.sql: id, check_item_id, item_name, item_id, working_hours, times, create_time, update_time, source, working_hours_id
mapper.insert: insert into test_item_order_working_hours (id, check_item_id, item_name, item_id, working_hours, times, create_time, update_time, source, working_hours_id,task_id,sample_id) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{checkItemId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{itemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{workingHours,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{times,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{source,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workingHoursId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{sampleId,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into test_item_order_working_hours
id,
check_item_id,
item_name,
item_id,
working_hours,
times,
create_time,
update_time,
source,
working_hours_id,
task_id,
sample_id,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{checkItemId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{itemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{itemId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{workingHours,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{times,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{source,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{workingHoursId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{sampleId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update test_item_order_working_hours
check_item_id = #{checkItemId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
item_name = #{itemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_id = #{itemId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
working_hours = #{workingHours,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
times = #{times,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
source = #{source,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
working_hours_id = #{workingHoursId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update test_item_order_working_hours set check_item_id = #{checkItemId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, item_name = #{itemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, item_id = #{itemId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, working_hours = #{workingHours,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, times = #{times,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, source = #{source,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, working_hours_id = #{workingHoursId,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: SELECT t1.id AS item_id, t1.check_item_id, t1.times, t1.check_item_name AS item_name, t1.sample_id, t2.working_hours FROM test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_product_item AS t2 ON t1.check_item_id = t2.check_item_id WHERE t1.task_id = #{taskId}
